title: YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - 211info
text: FAMILY & YOUTH SERVICES YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessment and treatment for mental health, drug and alcohol abuse. Provides dual-diagnosis and intensive mental-health services for teens. Operates Minor in Possession (MIP) Diversion program, adolescent sex offender program and assists young survivors of sexual abuse. The Parent Child Interaction Therapy (PCIT) program provides treatment for conduct-disordered children. Services delivered after an assessment and treatment plan is developed. 420 NE 5th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm, extended hours by appointment (503) 343-7462 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 434-7462 Main phone Main phone (503) 343-7462 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for information, intake forms must be filled out prior to initial appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and OpenCard, sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients (cash or check payments only) DOCUMENTS: Completed intake form LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Child Guidance Diversion Programs * Adolescents Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Sex Offender Counseling * Adolescents Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YAMHILL COUNTY CRISIS LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILY & YOUTH SERVICES
